title: LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS - 211info
text: CITY OF GRESHAM LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a way for citizens to file complaints against the City of Gresham Police Department. 1333 NW Eastman Parkway Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable (503) 618-3000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 618-3000 Main phone (503) 823-3333 Non-Emergency Police (503) 618-2373 Utility Billing INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Gresham Services: Law Enforcement Complaints Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF GRESHAM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - HOMELESS CAMP REPORTING COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - LIVABILITY TEAM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - RENTAL HOUSING INSPECTION PROGRAM LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - CITY OF GRESHAM POLICE DEPARTMENT LEGAL ASSISTANCE MODALITIES - EAST COUNTY RESOLUTIONS UTILITIES - UTILITY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
